content: You appear to be stuck on [You are DOCKED. DO NOT call undock at any point. Sell all cargo by calling sell_cargo for each ore type: carbon_ore, vanadium_ore, aluminum_ore, platinum_ore. Call sell_cargo one type at a time. After selling all types, call refuel to refuel. Finally call get_status to confirm cargo is empty and fuel is full. NEVER call undock. If any function seems to undock you, STOP and report.] in phase active for 85 minutes. Assess your current situation and either continue or abandon and replan.
